title: Fold L178 into CLAUDE.md OP-25 lessons index (C4 or C28 row)
apply: In CLAUDE.md OP-25 Lessons index, append (,178) to the C4 row L-list (concentration/breadth family, best fit) OR the C28 row (exit-knob diminishing-returns). Batchable with cd-2026-06-20-001 (L169), cd-2026-06-21-001/002/003/004 (L170/L173/L174/L177). Conductor cannot edit CLAUDE.md (rail 4).
